third is inconsistent |list1 = * [[Dazaifu Tenmangū]] ([[Dazaifu, Fukuoka]]) -- One of the Sōhonsha (head shrines) of Tenman-gū * [[Kitano Tenmangū]] ([[Kamigyo, Kyoto]]) -- Another Sōhonsha of Tenman-gū |group2 = Other Shrines |list2 = * {{ill|Nagaoka Tenmangū|ja|長岡天満宮}} ([[Nagaokakyo, Kyoto]]) * {{ill|Misode Tenmangū|ja|御袖天満宮}} ([[Onomichi, Hiroshima]]) * [[Osaka Tenmangū]] ([[Kita-ku, Osaka]]) * [[Hōfu Tenmangū]] ([[Hofu, Yamaguchi]]) * [[Yabo Tenmangū]] ([[Kunitachi, Tokyo]]) * [[Yamada Tenmangū]], [[Nagoya]] * [[Yushima Tenmangū]] ([[Bunkyo, Tokyo]]) * [[Kameido Tenjin Shrine]] ([[Koto, Tokyo]]) }} }} [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Tenjin (kami)]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]]
